After my initial conversation with Brandon it was obvious he was quite professional and a high-level communicator, taking into account my concerns an offering me multiple options moving forward.

Although initially we needed a leaky window and potentially rotten section of exterior wall repaired, we decided to add more repairs to the job that had built up over the years and allow HR Quality Construction to take care of it, in one massive restoration. Stripping all stucco, installing new siding, repairing a deck, replacing windows, framing-in exterior doors and knocking out/rebuilding an exterior wall were some of the concurrent activities the crew was taking on repairing our home. These guys understand how to manage time and resources and nothing was wasted throughout the day. HR Quality Construction utilized an electrician, drywaller, painter and a vinyl deck specialist to help complete the renovation and everyone was incredibly good at what they do.

Quality is in the company's name for a reason as the craftsmanship and attention to detail displayed throughout the job was outstanding. The deck, complemented with rough cut fur for the stairs, railings banisters Etc. is rock solid. It looks absolutely incredible as does the siding, windows and exterior doors.

Overall it was an incredibly positive 10/10 experience having Brandon and Connor on the property each day working on our house. We weren't just glad to find HR Quality Construction, I consider ourselves lucky. We will definitely be seeking out their expertise in the future for some interior repairs that are well past due.

Rene & Laurel","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDX-Ij9Og&fid=0x0:0xb6a2396d0958a37"],"When":"2024-10-24"},{"Name":"Hayley Kelland","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKRg7VTLnQo7H2x6mFjnoE_eclFbHvcKF80hbcOLIBoxOV3TQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I called Brandon with a concern over our living room exterior wall. Everything from the consultation and design phase, going over multiple options, to the installation, to the help Small Planet provided in navigating the Canada Greener Homes and BC Hydro rebate processes, we have been delighted! Over the summer we have been generating far more electricity than we consume, and this includes charging an EV that we drive a lot, which is close to half of our total consumption. Trying to convince my wife we need a solar panel carport now haha.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC4wP9SbnNuFkblHY7kuprx&fid=0x0:0x2ee3b35965331aef"],"When":"2025-9-2"},{"Name":"Aaron Chamberlin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV21BXcwU5zG_oWNWl2xjnYn3R-ZMHy0z_u7fbcrt2GIAw9gwPD=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I chose Small Planet Energy for my solar/battery backup system based on reviews, and my discussions with Jarek and Tara. They were always on time, extremely hard working, and the communication throughout was excellent.  Pride in their work is obvious, and resulted in a great looking (as well as great working) system.  There are many "fly by night" operations out there, but in my mind I was glad I went with an established and local company.  At least I know that if I need any follow-up care, they will be alive and well for years to come.  Thank-you Small Planet Energy!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Helen Bucci","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIF3R-j22u4uN8MuZDdXAW_wiVHSA21_VhB10VpxpHF8W7KWQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Small Panet knows their stuff when it comes to solar!
I’m a customer that has hired their services on two different homes and been very pleased with the organizing and professionalism of their team!
I requested different materials and a whole home surge protection, not a problem.
You are in good hands with Small Planet:)!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephen Bahen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLeZs5BkGB0hzYW63tQAMBL6XsCAd3mcDmZzCm-sgBdk4QJdg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Small Planet Energy started by doing an assessment of my energy needs and where on my roof would be the best place to maximize energy output.
They then discussed the pro and cons of Solar Panels with or without a battery storage system including government grants and interest free loans that were available. Once agreed they put together a proposal describing how the system would work, the cost, the qualification needed to apply for the interest fee loan and grants including 3rd Party energy assessment of my home. The home assessment was not solely for solar value added but include all aspect of improving energy efficiency such as where energy loss was occurring in the home compared to new high energy efficient homes and the potential fix including the addition of other effective energy reduction devices such as insulation, weather-stripping, heat pumps, etc. In short all aspects of making your home energy efficient in addition to producing your own energy. The before and after energy assessment is a requirement of the interest free loan and there is a charge by the 3rd party to do the before and after energy assessment and in my case the cost was a little over 1% of the Solar and Battery installation cost.
Small Planet Energy implemented my Solar and Battery system on the agreed schedule and at the agree cost.
While on site their team of installers were respectful of me and my property and every day the work site at the end of the day was  neat & tidy and secure. They all my question and found innovative ways to run the wiring from the panels on the roof to the attic and inside the walls to my garage to the control panels and to avoid holes in my roof, drywall and wall paneling.  I had put a extra vent in my roof and it caused an issue with the original efficient placement of panels on the roof. Small Planet Energy quickly did a reassessment and figured out a new pattern of panel placement that resulted in only a 1or 2 % loss of potential energy production. This on the go change was done at no cost to me and did not increase the cost of the project.
Small Planet Energy is a customer service oriented company that I would highly recommend and work with again in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bl and","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIdVw0KQvXcMpSVyXRsU3A1Mga_H6uYw92VyKohlzR5z-ekkg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our entire experience with Small Planet Energy was AMAZING. From our very first call and consultation (you rock Tara!) to the final installation was so smooth and seamless. We had a goal of investing in Solar for our home and Small Planet Energy completely delivered and made it possible. They helped us with everything along the way, recommended great products for our needs and were completely transparent with all costs and timelines..All communication was so excellent and punctual from start to finish. Jarek and his crew were extremely efficient, punctual, professional and knowledgable..We were able to completely trust Small Energy with our most important purchase and we can't thank them enough! We fully recommend Small Planet Energy  for any of your Solar or wind needs!! It really was a great overall experience.
10/10, definitely 5 stars!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDzw6HHSg&fid=0x0:0x2ee3b35965331aef"],"When":"2024-6-12"}]
